title: EPSILON-AETHER Geometric Sparse Attention (12L Record Attempt)
author: teerthsharma

data.description: Block-sparse attention with Cauchy-Schwarz event radar and dense fallback to reduce training compute.
Included as part of the baseline architecture stack.
Included as part of the baseline architecture stack.
Rotary positional embeddings used in the model.
Grouped-query attention with fewer KV heads than attention heads.
Johnson-Lindenstrauss random projection bridge to 32 dimensions with L2 normalization for sparse scoring.
Lyapunov-stable geometric governor / discrete-time PD controller for adaptive sparsity.
Chebyshev GC guard to bound false reclamation.

novel_contributions: AETHER block-sparse attention to reduce per-step compute and enable 12-layer training within the time budget
Cauchy-Schwarz block pruning with a soundness proof
Lyapunov-stable geometric governor for adaptive sparsity control
Johnson-Lindenstrauss projection bridge to 32 dimensions for faster scoring
Lean 4 formal proofs for pruning safety, governor stability, and GC bounds
